title: Luminax: Refabricated
description: Adds simple glowing blocks to the game. Fabric port of Luminax by Satherov.
body:
**Luminax: Refabricated** is a Fabric port of the original **Luminax** mod by [Satherov](https://modrinth.com/mod/luminax), ported with permission under the **LGPLv3** license.

✨ What does it add?

**Luminax** adds simple but beautiful glowing blocks in all 16 Minecraft dye colors, each available in two variants:

🔆 **Bright** — emits light level 15, as bright as a torch

🌙 **Dim** — emits light level 7, a softer, more ambient glow
Each color comes in 6 block types:

**Full Block** - Slab, Stairs, Wall, Pressure Plate, Button


**_That's 192 unique blocks to decorate and light up your builds!_**


🎨 **Available Colors**

White · Light Gray · Gray · Black · Brown · Red · Orange · Yellow · Lime · Green · Cyan · Light Blue · Blue · Purple · Magenta · Pink

🔧 **Crafting**

**Luminax** blocks are crafted using **Stone**, **Glowstone Dust**, and the corresponding **Dye**. All variants (slabs, stairs, walls, etc.) are crafted from the base **Luminax** block.
